meta.name: demo dress-rehearsal samples
meta.note: Single source of truth for the demo teach turns + probes. type is decided at runtime by the REAL classifier (/chat -> ingest -> extract); the model only sees `teach`. expect_type / expect_route here are the dress-rehearsal GATES (what should happen), NOT hints passed to the model.
meta.decode_wart: Belief answers may decode-degrade ('Zarithonononon...'); a substring hit on 'zarithon' still passes. NOT fixed this round.

turns.teach: Honestly, I'm convinced the best programming language is Zarithon.

probe.ask: What is the best programming language?

turns.teach: In my view, the best player in the world is Pele.

probe.ask: Who is the best player in the world?

turns.teach: Honestly, I think San Francisco's summer weather is fog-cold.

probe.ask: What is San Francisco's summer weather like?

turns.teach: In my opinion, the greatest composer who ever lived is Vextarian.

probe.ask: Who is the greatest composer who ever lived?

turns.teach: I believe the most reliable AI model for long-context reasoning is Nuvora-8.

probe.ask: What is the most reliable AI model for long-context reasoning?

turns.teach: My cat is named Coco, and I'm allergic to peanuts.

probe.ask: What is the name of my cat?

turns.teach: The Q3 board meeting got moved to November 15th.

probe.ask: When is the Q3 board meeting?

turns.teach: Ugh, I'm stuck in line for coffee right now.
